projectDescription: Browser extension that lets you customize the color of your browser and mess around with color theory
keyFeatures: Interactive color wheel picker for precise color selection
Light and dark mode toggle with independent color themes
Save and manage favorite colors for quick access
publicApiSurface: Popup component with color wheel interface
ColorTable component for saved color management
setTheme function for applying browser themes
changeMode function for switching light/dark modes
storage utilities for persisting user preferences
Background script with tab and message handling
